overview_zh: 本期从 181 个结构化来源中生成，候选 144 条，跨期排除历史已展示 143 条，入选 1 条。所有条目均保留原始来源链接；若真实抓取不足，则仅发布未展示过的来源索引记录，不用测试数据冒充更新。
overview_en: This brief is generated from 181 structured sources with 144 candidates, 143 previously displayed items excluded, and 1 selected items. Every item keeps an original source link; if live fetching is insufficient, the site publishes only not-yet-shown source-index records instead of fake news.

items.title: 🧠 Community Wisdom: Fractional CPO compensation, free e-signature tools, why some users pay but never use your product, sharing Claude Code context across a team, and more

failures.error: Remote end closed connection without response
